testcase.name: @stynx/sessions barrel > exports at least one symbol
SessionJwksController API contract > publishes the signing service JWKS payload
SessionJwtSigningService.signAccessToken > produces a 3-segment JWT signed by the active key
SessionJwtSigningService.signAccessToken > binds exact JWT header, payload claims, and access expiry
SessionJwtSigningService.signAccessToken > omits optional JWT audience and permission hash claims when unset
SessionJwtSigningService.signAccessToken > caches resolved keys across calls (singleton)
SessionJwtSigningService.signAccessToken > throws SessionSigningKeyError when activeKid is not present in keys
SessionJwtSigningService.signAccessToken > reloads signing keys exactly when the cache ttl boundary is reached
SessionJwtSigningService.signAccessToken > throws when neither jwt.keySet nor jwt.secretId is configured
SessionJwtSigningService.signAccessToken > throws when jwt.secretId is set but SecretLoader is unavailable
SessionJwtSigningService.signAccessToken > secretLoader path (validateKeySet) > signs successfully when secret loader returns a valid key set
SessionJwtSigningService.signAccessToken > secretLoader path (validateKeySet) > rejects when secret JSON is not an object
SessionJwtSigningService.signAccessToken > secretLoader path (validateKeySet) > rejects when currentKid is missing or empty
SessionJwtSigningService.signAccessToken > secretLoader path (validateKeySet) > rejects when keys array is missing or empty
SessionJwtSigningService.signAccessToken > secretLoader path (validateKeySet) > rejects when a key entry is not an object
SessionJwtSigningService.signAccessToken > secretLoader path (validateKeySet) > rejects when a key entry is missing kid/publicKeyPem/privateKeyPem
SessionJwtSigningService.signAccessToken > secretLoader path (validateKeySet) > preserves activatesAt + expiresAt when present
SessionJwtSigningService.signAccessToken > secretLoader path (validateKeySet) > rejects null with the EXACT "Session key material is missing" message (kills ConditionalExpression L34)
SessionJwtSigningService.signAccessToken > secretLoader path (validateKeySet) > rejects undefined with the EXACT "Session key material is missing" message
SessionJwtSigningService.signAccessToken > secretLoader path (validateKeySet) > rejects scalar with EXACT "Session key material is missing" (kills LogicalOperator || → &&)
SessionJwtSigningService.signAccessToken > secretLoader path (validateKeySet) > rejects missing currentKid with EXACT "missing currentKid" message (kills StringLiteral L44)

SessionJwtSigningService.signAccessToken > secretLoader path (validateKeySet) > rejects empty-string currentKid with EXACT "missing currentKid" (kills EqualityOperator currentKid.length === 0 → !== 0)
SessionJwtSigningService.signAccessToken > secretLoader path (validateKeySet) > rejects non-string currentKid (numeric) with the SAME currentKid message (kills ConditionalExpression typeof)
SessionJwtSigningService.signAccessToken > secretLoader path (validateKeySet) > rejects non-array keys with EXACT "has no keys" message (kills ConditionalExpression on Array.isArray)
SessionJwtSigningService.signAccessToken > secretLoader path (validateKeySet) > rejects empty-array keys with EXACT "has no keys" message (kills EqualityOperator keys.length === 0 → !== 0)
SessionJwtSigningService.signAccessToken > secretLoader path (validateKeySet) > rejects null key entry with EXACT "is invalid" message (kills ConditionalExpression L54)
SessionJwtSigningService.signAccessToken > secretLoader path (validateKeySet) > rejects key entry missing kid with EXACT "is incomplete" message (kills LogicalOperator || chain L63-67)
SessionJwtSigningService.signAccessToken > secretLoader path (validateKeySet) > rejects key entry missing privateKeyPem with EXACT "is incomplete" message
SessionJwtSigningService.signAccessToken > base64UrlEncode (kills Regex survivors at jwt-signing.service.ts:30) > produces a 3-part token with no trailing = in any segment
RedisSessionStore > requires initialization and closes only open clients
RedisSessionStore > creates, rotates, touches, revokes, indexes, and publishes sessions
RedisSessionStore > prunes stale ids from indexes
SessionService > creates, reads, and revokes a session
SessionService > omits empty device metadata and create metadata from stored session records
SessionService > rotates refresh tokens and kills the family when an old token is reused
SessionService > enforces absolute and idle timeout windows
SessionService > treats absolute and idle expiry timestamps as expired at the exact boundary
SessionService > supports clock skew when access tokens have a slightly future nbf
SessionService > survives 1000 sequential refresh cycles without leaking live session records
SessionService > exchanges an active session for a new tenant-scoped session
SessionService > rejects tenant exchange for a mismatched actor
SessionService > rejects tenant exchange for a missing session
SessionService > rejects tenant exchange for an inactive session
SessionService > returns null or false for missing session operations and invalid refresh tokens
SessionService > rethrows non-expiry inactive session errors from get
SessionService > returns null for direct in-memory touch and rotate misses
SessionService > rejects refresh when lookup points at a missing session or rotation fails
SessionService > skips session mirroring when infrastructure providers are not available
SessionService > writes mirror rows with membership ids when infrastructure providers are available
SessionService > resolves optional audience and secret-id session options
SessionService > exchanges sessions without carrying optional device metadata or create metadata
SessionService > revokes all sessions for a user or tenant with one invalidation per affected scope
SessionService > does not publish tenant invalidation when no tenant sessions are active
SessionService > excludes missing sessions from revoke-all counts, invalidations, and mirror writes
SessionService > mirror payload excludes undefined membershipId (kills EqualityOperator + ObjectLiteral at session.service.ts:293, 320) > omits membershipId from mirror entry when session has none
SessionService > mirror payload excludes undefined membershipId (kills EqualityOperator + ObjectLiteral at session.service.ts:293, 320) > includes membershipId in mirror entry when session has one
InMemorySessionStore — mutation kills > rotateRefreshToken returns null when refresh-lookup state is not active (kills ConditionalExpression at L48)
InMemorySessionStore — mutation kills > rotateRefreshToken returns null when currentHash does not match session refreshTokenHash (kills second ConditionalExpression at L48)
InMemorySessionStore — mutation kills > publishInvalidation emits on the literal "invalidate" channel (kills StringLiteral at L130)
